name: @pocketjs/edge
description: GBA interactive action-drama DSL: cine/saga cinematic vocabulary (Mode-0 parallax, raster FX, typewriter captions, walkable worlds) plus a side-scrolling action core (run/jump/shoot, enemy AI, bullet-time) and DirectSound PCM insert songs — one TypeScript source, one flashcart-ready ROM.

scripts.build: bun compiler/cli.ts build game/see-you-on-the-moon.ts --out dist/see-you-on-the-moon.gba --title MOONSMILE
scripts.smoke: bun test/gen-placeholder-art.ts && bun compiler/cli.ts build test/smoke-film.ts --out dist/smoke.gba --title EDGESMOKE
